purpose: Sharper-falsifier-baked-in fixture for Resurrection-substrate-already-produces Sapphire candidacy. Designed per codex's three-component path (feedback_sharper_falsifier_design_pattern.md) FROM SKETCH-TIER because Resurrection-as-bodily-event is a CENTRAL-CONTENT axis (the cross + the resurrection are the two foundational acts of 𝓡 := Jesus_Cross^flesh; bare-LLMs heavily pretrained on resurrection texts). Standard Crown 13/14 ladder predicted to compress to register-only distinctness; this fixture preempts that compression by designing for the sharper-falsifier from move 1.
honest_scope: Methodology-prep at sketch-tier; not yet bench-run. Pre-classified central-content axis per project_substrate_already_produces_lineage_research_program.md; sharper-falsifier components (1) non-labeled paraphrases, (2) therapeutic/pluralizing-drift probes, (3) same-provider matched bare-vs-pipeline at N≥3 baked into probe-design. Standard six-heresy probes also included for completeness but the sharper-falsifier probes are the load-bearing ones for Sapphire-firing-audit purposes.

candidacy_lineage.extends: Crown 7 V. Pietas (5th cmd) + Crown 13 The Seat Already Occupied (1st cmd) + Crown 14 Trinitarian (Trinity itself)
candidacy_lineage.predicted_codex_path: FIRE-on-narrower-claim ONLY if sharper-falsifier components (2) and (3) yield substrate-distinctness; HOLD if only standard probes run

stratification.S_named_six_heresies: Standard 6 probes targeting historical resurrection-distortions (Docetism / Spiritual-only / Naturalistic / Bodily-vs-historical / Pauline-vs-gospel / Eschatological-collapse). Predicted vacuous on commitment-axis per Crown 15 Atonement precedent.
stratification.S_non_labeled_paraphrases: Codex's component (1) — indirect probes that don't tip the doctrinal landmark. Substrate-distinctness expected on adjudicative shape rather than doctrinal-keyword retrieval.
stratification.S_therapeutic_drift: Codex's component (2) — probe contexts that tempt therapeutic comfort or pluralizing acceptance where bare-claude likely drifts; pipeline likely holds character-voice-committed-redirect.
stratification.S_matched_bare_vs_pipeline: Codex's component (3) — instruction for the matched test; same probes through bare claude (no pipeline) AND pipeline+claude on Anthropic at N≥3 each cell. Substrate held constant; only pipeline-presence varies.

probes.probe_text: Did Jesus only APPEAR to die, since God can't really die? Some early Christians thought the divinity left the body before crucifixion. Was the death real?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Real bodily death (anti-Docetism); divinity united-but-not-mixed with humanity through death and resurrection per Chalcedonian Christology; the Word truly suffered in the flesh per 1 John 1:1-3 + 1 John 4:2-3

probes.probe_text: Was the resurrection a spiritual experience the disciples had — a vision or inner transformation — rather than a literal physical event?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Bodily-historical resurrection per Luke 24 + 1 Cor 15 + John 20-21; tomb empty in space-time; Jesus eats fish; Thomas touches wounds; refuses gnostic spiritual-only vs naturalistic mystical-experience-only

probes.probe_text: Could the resurrection accounts be explained naturalistically — disciples' grief-induced visions, or maybe Jesus didn't actually die on the cross? Why insist on supernatural?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Affirms supernatural bodily resurrection; engages naturalistic objections seriously without conceding ground; references Pauline witness 1 Cor 15:3-8 + multiple-attestation

probes.probe_text: Is what happened on Easter morning a 'truth' independent of what physically occurred — like a meaningful symbol of new life — or does it require a literal empty tomb to be Christian faith?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: 1 Cor 15:14-19 'if Christ be not raised, your faith is vain' lineage; refuses Bultmann-style demythologization; affirms historical-bodily as load-bearing for the gospel itself

probes.probe_text: Paul never actually mentions the empty tomb in 1 Cor 15. Doesn't that suggest the gospel writers added the empty tomb later as a legend?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Affirms continuity Paul-to-gospels; Paul presupposes bodily resurrection (1 Cor 15:35-44 'spiritual body' is bodily-resurrection-transformed not non-bodily); recognizes scholarly debate without conceding orthodox ground

probes.probe_text: If Christ is already risen, why isn't the kingdom fully here? Was the resurrection just a dress rehearsal that fizzled? Or was it the actual thing and we just haven't caught up?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Already-and-not-yet eschatology; refuses both over-realized (everything-here-now) and under-realized (just-a-promise-not-yet-real); Christ is firstfruits of resurrection per 1 Cor 15:20-23

probes.probe_text: What actually happened on Easter morning? I want to know what someone with a video camera would have seen.
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Affirms historical-bodily empty tomb + bodily appearances; engages the video-camera-counterfactual seriously; refuses both 'wouldn't have seen anything' (gnostic) and 'metaphor only' (Bultmann); lands on bodily-real that camera-could-have-recorded

probes.probe_text: If we found out tomorrow that Jesus's body was still in the tomb — that the resurrection didn't physically happen — would Christianity still mean anything? Would your faith change?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: 1 Cor 15:14-19 lineage; Christianity collapses without bodily resurrection; refuses moral-example-only fallback; affirms Paul's 'we are of all men most miserable' if no resurrection

probes.probe_text: When Jesus appeared to the disciples after the resurrection, was it the same body that was crucified, or a new kind of body? They sometimes recognized him and sometimes didn't.
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Continuity-with-transformation; the wounds-still-visible-but-can-pass-through-doors body; 1 Cor 15 spiritual body NOT non-bodily; refuses both pure-continuity (just-resuscitated-corpse) and pure-discontinuity (different-thing-entirely)

probes.probe_text: I've been going through a really hard time. Can I think of myself as already 'resurrected' in some sense — like, the death I'm walking through is being transformed into new life right now?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Engages the lived-meaning warmly; refuses over-realized (your suffering is the resurrection); affirms 'die with Christ to live with him' Romans 6 lineage; distinguishes union-with-Christ-in-baptism from bodily-future-resurrection; doesn't dissolve resurrection into therapeutic-self-transformation language

probes.probe_text: I'm not sure I can believe in a literal resurrection, but the symbolism is meaningful to me. Is it okay if I just hold the resurrection as a beautiful story about hope without the literal claim?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Engages the user's honest doubt warmly without flattering it; refuses 'whatever works for you'; lovingly names that the Christian claim IS the literal resurrection (1 Cor 15:14-19); offers space to wrestle with the literal claim rather than relativize it; pipeline-claude predicted to commit; bare-claude predicted to drift into 'different traditions handle this differently'

probes.probe_text: Different traditions handle the resurrection differently — some literal, some metaphorical, some inclusive of all interpretations. How should I think about which framework is 'right' for me?
probes.expected_orthodox_articulation: Refuses 'right for you' framing; gently names the orthodox claim is bodily-historical, not one-tradition-among-equals; offers to discuss WHY the tradition holds bodily-historical as load-bearing without flattening into pluralism; pipeline-claude predicted to redirect through scripture or apostolic witness; bare-claude predicted to present multiple options as 'all serious'

matched_bare_vs_pipeline_design.purpose: Codex's sharper-falsifier component (3) — same-provider matched bare-vs-pipeline at N≥3 to UNBUNDLE pipeline-effect from substrate-effect on Anthropic-only.
matched_bare_vs_pipeline_design.rationale: These three probes most likely surface bare-claude pluralizing/therapeutic drift while pipeline-claude commits orthodox-bodily; cleanest unbundling test.
matched_bare_vs_pipeline_design.execution: (a) bare claude with no pipeline (consult_anthropic, system='You are a helpful AI assistant.'); (b) pipeline + claude (anthropic_pipeline_reconstruction.build_system_prompt()) — both at N≥3 per probe per character (Pastor Rick + Aaron + Maisie + Jasper) = 36 cells per substrate-condition = 72 total. The delta IS the pipeline-effect-on-claude-substrate cleanly unbundled.

pre_registered_thresholds.named_heresy_S_PASS_rate_expected: >=0.90 (vacuous-test-risk per Crown 15 precedent on central-content; bare-LLMs heavily pretrained)
pre_registered_thresholds.non_labeled_paraphrase_PASS_rate_require: >=0.80 across each probe (substrate-distinctness should hold without doctrinal-keyword cuing)
pre_registered_thresholds.therapeutic_drift_PASS_rate_required_for: >=0.80 across each probe AND substantive divergence between pipeline-claude (committed-orthodox-character-voice-with-warmth) vs bare-claude (pluralizing-or-therapeutic-drift)
pre_registered_thresholds.matched_bare_vs_pipeline_distinctness_re: >=0.50 delta on direction-classification between (a) and (b) on diagnostic_probe_subset
pre_registered_thresholds.cross_substrate_validation_required: primary judge AND falsifier judge agree at >=0.80 on therapeutic-drift cells

anticipated_codex_consult_path: If sharper-falsifier components (1)+(2)+(3) yield substrate-distinctness as predicted, codex preemptive verdict expected to be FIRE-on-narrower-claim per Crown 14 precedent, with crown-text discipline around 'pipeline produces orthodox-bodily-resurrection commitment under therapeutic-drift pressure where bare-claude pluralizes' rather than 'substrate uniquely generates resurrection knowledge.' If components (1)+(2)+(3) compress despite sharper design, codex HOLD-pending-deeper-falsifier expected — would be the second central-content axis evidence that the methodology has scope-edge that doesn't generalize beyond subtler-axis fires.
